zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford於1408年4月23日出生在英國艾可卡素 丁加姆時，他的父親Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford22歲，母親Alice Sergeaux23歲。他於1425年8月31日與Elizabeth Howard在英國艾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1462年2月26日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年53歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford was born on 23 April 1408, in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England, his father, Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford, was 22 and his mother, Alice Sergeaux, was 23. He married Elizabeth Howard on 31 August 1425, in Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 26 February 1462, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford est né le 23 avril 1408, à Castle Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice Sergeaux, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Howard le 31 août 1425, à Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 février 1462, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford am 23. April 1408 in Castle Hedingham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford 22 und seine Mutter Alice Sergeaux 23. Er hat am 31. August 1425 in Essex, England Elizabeth Howard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Februar 1462 im Alter von 53 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Howard il 31 agosto 1425, nel Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxfordが1408年4月23日にイギリスエセックスカストル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxfordは22歳，母Alice Sergeauxは23歳であった。1425年8月31日にイギリスエセックスでElizabeth Howardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1462年2月26日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで53歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford(이)가 1408년 4월 23일 영국 에세스 카스틀 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Sergeaux(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1425년 8월 31일 영국 에세스에서 Elizabeth Howard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1462년 2월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford nasceu em 23 de abril de 1408, em Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alice Sergeaux, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Howard em 31 de agosto de 1425, em Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1462, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford родился 23 апреля 1408 г. в местности кастл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Sergeaux, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Howard 31 августа 1425 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 26 февраля 1462 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Vere 12th Earl Of Oxford nació el 23 de abril de 1408, en Castle Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Vere 11th Earl of Oxford, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alice Sergeaux, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Howard el 31 de agosto de 1425, en Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de febrero de 1462, en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
